# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

find_package(linux-headers-generic REQUIRED)

add_executable(yt-flow-library-cpp-tables-tests-test_input_messages)


set_property(TARGET yt-flow-library-cpp-tables-tests-test_input_messages PROPERTY OUTPUT_NAME
  flow-cpp-integration-test-input-messages
)

target_compile_options(yt-flow-library-cpp-tables-tests-test_input_messages PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(yt-flow-library-cpp-tables-tests-test_input_messages PUBLIC
  linux-headers-generic::linux-headers-generic
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  build-cow-on
  library-cpp-cpuid_check
  cpp-testing-gtest
  cpp-testing-gtest_main
  yt-core-test_framework
  yt-client-cache
  library-cpp-common
  library-cpp-tables
)

target_allocator(yt-flow-library-cpp-tables-tests-test_input_messages
  cpp-malloc-tcmalloc
  libs-tcmalloc-no_percpu_cache
)

target_link_options(yt-flow-library-cpp-tables-tests-test_input_messages PRIVATE
  -ldl
  -lrt
  -Wl,--no-as-needed
  -fPIC
  -fPIC
  -lrt
  -ldl
  -lutil
)

target_sources(yt-flow-library-cpp-tables-tests-test_input_messages PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/tables/tests/test_input_messages/test_input_messages.cpp
)


add_test(
  NAME
  flow-cpp-integration-test-input-messages
  COMMAND
  flow-cpp-integration-test-input-messages
)

set_property(
  TEST
  flow-cpp-integration-test-input-messages
  PROPERTY
  LABELS
  MEDIUM
)

set_property(
  TEST
  flow-cpp-integration-test-input-messages
  PROPERTY
  ENVIRONMENT
)

vcs_info(yt-flow-library-cpp-tables-tests-test_input_messages)

set_property(
  TEST
  flow-cpp-integration-test-input-messages
  PROPERTY
  PROCESSORS
  1
)
